meta.title: Khanshoof — Digital signage that just works
hero.title: Digital signage that
hero.sub: Khanshoof turns any screen in your shop, clinic, or kiosk into a living menu board — priced fairly, bilingual by design, and ready for the Gulf market from day one.
hero.proof: Starter plan from 3 KWD/month — up to 3 screens.
features.title: Built for shop owners, not stadiums.
features.sub: A fair price, a fast setup, and the tiny touches that matter when you're running a café in Salmiya or a clinic in Hawalli.
features.screen.heading: Any screen, in ten minutes
features.screen.body: Plug an old TV or tablet in, scan the pairing code, done. No hardware to buy, no installer to wait for.
features.zones.heading: Zones, playlists, schedules
features.zones.body: Split a screen into tidy zones. Run a playlist in each. Schedule your weekend specials once and forget them.
features.ai.heading: AI menu, from your website
features.ai.body: Paste a URL. Khanshoof pulls your menu, your colours, your logo — and drafts a polished playlist you can edit in minutes.
features.pay.heading: Pay your way
features.pay.body: Card, Apple Pay, Google Pay on day one. KNET for Kuwait is on its way — because local trust is not optional.
how.title: Three steps to a screen that sells.
how.step1.heading: Sign up in a minute
how.step1.body: Business name, email, password. You land on a clean dashboard with a 5-day free trial already running.
how.step2.heading: Upload, arrange, schedule
how.step2.body: Drop images and videos, group them into playlists, split screens into zones — a weekly menu or a happy-hour rotation is 15 minutes of work.
how.step3.heading: Pair any screen and you're live
how.step3.body: Open the player URL on any TV or tablet, type the six-digit pairing code, and the right content appears instantly.
pricing.title: Five tiers. No surprises.
pricing.sub: Priced in KWD. Billed monthly. Cancel anytime — we'd rather earn next month than trap you in a contract.
pricing.starter.label: Starter
pricing.growth.label: Growth
pricing.business.label: Business
pricing.pro.label: Pro
pricing.enterprise.label: Enterprise
spotlight.title: Your website, turned into a menu board — in under a minute.
spotlight.body: Paste your website or Instagram URL. Khanshoof reads your menu, extracts your brand palette and logo, and drafts a polished playlist — ready to tweak and publish. The feature that killed our competitors' ten-hour designer bills.
faq.title: Answers before you ask.
faq.q1.q: What devices can show the content?
faq.q1.a: Any device with a modern browser — smart TVs, Android boxes, Raspberry Pis, old iPads, or a laptop plugged into an HDMI cable. You pair by opening a URL and typing a six-digit code.
faq.q2.a: No. Upload images or videos, drag them into a playlist, and go. Zones, schedules, and transitions are already handled. The upcoming AI menu generator drafts the first version for you.
faq.q3.a: Full bilingual English + Arabic with right-to-left layouts is coming in Phase 2. The product is built for Gulf business owners from day one — Arabic is not an afterthought.
faq.q4.a: Credit card, Apple Pay, and Google Pay through Stripe — live at launch. KNET is on the roadmap for Kuwait customers who want to pay locally.
faq.q5.a: You pick a plan, enter a card, and keep going. No auto-charge during the trial — we ask before we bill.
cta.title: Ready to make it?
cta.sub: 5 days free. No card. No lock-in.
